data.body: STACK VOTES: #764 (6fe2) LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 -- FULLY GREEN. #765 (e622) LLM-Review +1 (code review passed all patchsets), but Verified -1 on the SAME enrich-prune flake (241 lost) -- confirmed a FLAKE because #764's identical rebased code PASSED Verified while #765 failed the same test. The upstream fix (9938a8aab) reduced but didn't eliminate the race under CI xdist load. Posted 'recheck' to #765 to re-run CI (per project flake protocol). 568c implementer running. Once 568c is validated+pushed and all 3 changes are Verified +1 (rechecking flakes as needed), close bottom-up + submit top.
